---
name: RFC Proposal
about: Propose a change to the ANRS specification
title: '[RFC] '
labels: 'rfc: proposed'
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One paragraph summary of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change necessary? What problems does it solve?

## Detailed Design

Describe the proposed solution in detail.

### Spec Changes

List any changes to specification files:

- [ ] `spec/ENTRY.md`
- [ ] `spec/state/state.schema.json`
- [ ] `spec/contracts/*.json`
- [ ] Other: ___

### CLI Changes

List any changes to CLI commands:

- [ ] `anrs init`
- [ ] `anrs status`
- [ ] `anrs upgrade`
- [ ] New command: ___

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Migration Path

How do existing users upgrade? Is this backward compatible?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [RFC process](../rfcs/README.md)
- [ ] This change requires an RFC (spec/protocol/breaking changes)
- [ ] I am willing to implement this RFC if accepted
